series_metadata.series_description: Contains all documents regarding investigation of non chargeable cases/complaints involving alleged violations of OAC/ORC Chapter 4734.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 fiscal years then destroy, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance. ; Electronic: Retain 3 fiscal years then destroy, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
